name: Retail & Supermarket Chains
subject: Cable supply for {company_name}
body:
Hi {contact_name},

{company_name} carries a wide range of electronics — and cables are one of those categories where going direct to a factory makes a real margin difference.

We run two plants (China + Vietnam), 800K pcs/month, MOQ from 500 pcs with custom packaging. CE/RoHS/UL certified. 18 years supplying retail chains across Europe and North America.

Mind if I send over a sample price list? Just to benchmark against your current supplier.
